sheets-nate.text: Nate Sheets is a candidate for Texas Commissioner of Agriculture, running with Republican Party of Texas.
Nate Sheets's recorded background: Nate Sheets, beekeeper and small business owner.
No public data in our set on Nate Sheets's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

tucker-clayton.text: Clayton Tucker is a candidate for Texas Commissioner of Agriculture, running with Texas Democratic Party.
Clayton Tucker's recorded background: Clayton Tucker, rancher and founder of the Texas Progressive Caucus.
No public data in our set on Clayton Tucker's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

base.summary: Texas Commissioner of Agriculture race: Nate Sheets, Clayton Tucker. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and (for federal candidates only) FEC campaign finance totals. We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set; state executive offices generally do not file with the FEC, so campaign finance is not available for most of them here.

renter_young_worker.summary: For a renter young worker voter looking at the Texas Commissioner of Agriculture race (Nate Sheets, Clayton Tucker): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on housing costs, rent, or renters' protections for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
renter_young_worker.caveats: We only show a connection to renter young worker concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.
